TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == kakaliman == U-lan-pa-tuo ÁÉŹŤė≠Ś∑īśČė U-lan-pa-tuo-se " Mun-ku kamu Š†§Š†ĮŠ††Š†≠Š††Š†®Š†™Š††Š†≠Š††Š†≤Š†§Š†∑, Si-li-e sulit : –£–Ľ–į–į–Ĺ–Ī–į–į—ā–į—Ä, nalngal nu Mun-ku: ( äňĆ…ģaňźm‚ÄŅ'paňź įt…ôŐÜr) , u suo-tu nu Mun-ku kanatal. U-lan-pa-tuo itida i Mun-ku talakaway a buyu' nu teban a niyaduan, kitidaan makaala tu 4704 pin-hun-kun-li, tademaw hakiya makaala tu 144 a wangan nu tademaw, mikipangkiw tu Mun-ku a tademaw , u satabakiay nu Mun-ku a tukay, cen-ce, tatelungan nu kakadidengan. mililis tu Tu-la-sa'wac, satanayu' sa, nutipan idaw ku U-lan-pa-tuo Cen-ci-se-han a pahikukian, maci nu timulan idaw ku Mun-ku Sen-sa-puo-ke-ta-han buyu', tungduh nu buyu' idaw ku Cey-sang kakininaga a paya, sipakay pabaw miadih maadih ku macimacian. tatelungan nu maci idaw ku kanatal kun atu Su-he-pa-tuo putah. mitulin tu Cung-E' a Mun-ku mitesul tu dadan nu silamalay taydan i U-lan-pa-tuo, amis katukuh tu Se'-le'ke sen Su-he'-pa-tuo, tumul katukuh tu Cung-kuo Nae-mun-ku nu udip a kitidaan E-lin-haw-te'-se. 145 : ( äňĆ…ģaňźm‚ÄŅ'paňź įt…ôŐÜr) , . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ i laylayan nu Mun-ku a cudad nu U-lan-pa-tuo nu tawyaay a ngangan nu lalaan. makawali katukuh tu kawanan u U-e-ka, Ta-ku'-lun, Cin-cen-ku'-lun, U-lan-pa-tuo. 23 U-lan-pa-tuo nitahawan patideng i cin-caw-cung-de sapatay a mihcaan " caynemlusiw mihcaan" naw Mun-ku-ke-e-ke-pu a samiyan ci Se'-pu'-cun-dan-pa-hu-tu-ke'-tu itida patideng, saan u Ku-lun "—Ö“Į—Ä—ć—ć/Š†¨Š†¶Š†∑Š†ĘŠ†∂Š†éŠ†°", langatan ku liwliw nu lutuk. itida i Tu-sya-tu-ha niyadu'an nu Cung-ci lalabu. Cin-lun nu zitayan , Ku-lun u Ku-lun kakitidaan nu tapang. Cin-lun sepat a bataan idaw ku tulu a mihcaan " caypicpicwal mihcaan" , cin-caw patideng tu sapilawa' a cabeng, atu Mun-ku nu dumaan a kitidaan sipangangan tu "Ku-lun" a kakitidaan a kakenihan, ina maci u Ta-ku-lin "–ė—Ö –•“Į—Ä—ć—ć", hekalay a kanatal pangangan han tina kitidaan u U-e-ka "”®—Ä–≥”©”©, igu :Urga, imi u "luma nu tahudan" 100 "caysiwcaycay" Sin-hay-ke-min, pase ci Ce-pu-cun-dan-pa itida i E'-luo-se-ti'-kuo a nipacukedan mihapu i hekal nu Mun-ku a misiteked, u Ta-han, patideng tu Ta-mun-ku kanatal, u Ta-ku'-lun ku suo-tu. sa Ta-ku-lun misumad tu ngangan u Cin-cen-ku'-lun " –Ě–ł–Ļ—Ā–Ľ—ć–Ľ –•“Į—Ä—ć—ć". caysiwcaylim mihcaan, Ce-pu-cun-dan-pa midawis milabu tu Cung-hua-min-kuo cung-tun ci Yen-se-kay, lawpesen ku nipisiteked, misumad tu udip tu sapikuwan tu udip a kanatal. caysiwcaysiw mihcaan, ci Si-su-cen ladayen nida ku hitay midebung tu Ku'-lun, lawpesen nida ku hekalay a Mun-ku nipikuwan tu udip. 1911 .
S.PHON: == kakar~…ĺiman == u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo **** u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo-s…ô " mun-ku kamu *************, si-r~…ĺi-…ô sur~…ĺit : ***********, nar~…ĺŇčar~…ĺ nu mun-ku: (***a*m* Ē~ °pa**t…ô*r) , u suo-tu nu mun-ku kanatar~…ĺ. u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo itida i mun-ku tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° nu t…ôban a nijaduan, kitidaan makaar~…ĺa tu **** pin-ńßun-kun-r~…ĺi, tad…ômaw ńßakija makaar~…ĺa tu *** a waŇčan nu tad…ômaw, mikipaŇčkiw tu mun-ku a tad…ômaw , u satabakiaj nu mun-ku a tukaj, ¶…ôn- ¶…ô, tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu kakadid…ôŇčan. mir~…ĺir~…ĺis tu tu-r~…ĺa-sa Ē~ °wa ¶, satanaju Ē~ ° sa, nutipan idaw ku u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo ¶…ôn- ¶i-s…ô-ńßan a pańßikukian, ma ¶i nu timur~…ĺan idaw ku mun-ku s…ôn-sa-puo-k…ô-ta-ńßan buju Ē~ °, tuŇčduńß nu buju Ē~ ° idaw ku ¶…ô-saŇč kakininaga a paja, sipakaj pabaw miadińß maadińß ku ma ¶ima ¶ian. tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu ma ¶i idaw ku kanatar~…ĺ kun atu su-ńß…ô-pa-tuo putańß. mitur~…ĺin tu ¶uŇč-…ô Ē~ ° a mun-ku mit…ôsur~…ĺ tu dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj tajdan i u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo, amis katukuńß tu s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ °k…ô s…ôn su-ńß…ô Ē~ °-pa-tuo, tumur~…ĺ katukuńß tu ¶uŇč-kuo na…ô-mun-ku nu udip a kitidaan …ô-r~…ĺin-ńßaw-t…ô Ē~ °-s…ô. *** : (***a*m* Ē~ °pa**t…ô*r) , . r~…ĺikisi ** i r~…ĺajr~…ĺajan nu mun-ku a ¶udad nu u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo nu tawjaaj a ŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaan. makawar~…ĺi katukuńß tu kawanan u u-…ô-ka, ta-ku Ē~ °-r~…ĺun, ¶in- ¶…ôn-ku Ē~ °-r~…ĺun, u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo. ** u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo nitańßawan patid…ôŇč i ¶in- ¶aw- ¶uŇč-d…ô sapataj a mińß ¶aan " ¶ajn…ômr~…ĺusiw mińß ¶aan" naw mun-ku-k…ô-…ô-k…ô-pu a samijan ¶i s…ô Ē~ °-pu Ē~ °- ¶un-dan-pa-ńßu-tu-k…ô Ē~ °-tu itida patid…ôŇč, saan u ku-r~…ĺun "*****/*******", r~…ĺaŇčatan ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu r~…ĺutuk. itida i tu-sja-tu-ńßa nijadu Ē~ °an nu ¶uŇč- ¶i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu. ¶in-r~…ĺun nu zitajan , ku-r~…ĺun u ku-r~…ĺun kakitidaan nu tapaŇč. ¶in-r~…ĺun s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan " ¶ajpi ¶pi ¶war~…ĺ mińß ¶aan" , ¶in- ¶aw patid…ôŇč tu sapir~…ĺawa Ē~ ° a ¶ab…ôŇč, atu mun-ku nu dumaan a kitidaan sipaŇčaŇčan tu "ku-r~…ĺun" a kakitidaan a kak…ônińßan, ina ma ¶i u ta-ku-r~…ĺin "** *****", ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a kanatar~…ĺ paŇčaŇčan ńßan tina kitidaan u u-…ô-ka "*****, igu :urga, imi u "r~…ĺuma nu tańßudan" *** " ¶ajsiw ¶aj ¶aj" sin-ńßaj-k…ô-min, pas…ô ¶i ¶…ô-pu- ¶un-dan-pa itida i …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-ti Ē~ °-kuo a nipa ¶uk…ôdan mińßapu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu mun-ku a misit…ôk…ôd, u ta-ńßan, patid…ôŇč tu ta-mun-ku kanatar~…ĺ, u ta-ku Ē~ °-r~…ĺun ku suo-tu. sa ta-ku-r~…ĺun misumad tu ŇčaŇčan u ¶in- ¶…ôn-ku Ē~ °-r~…ĺun " ******* *****". ¶ajsiw ¶ajr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, ¶…ô-pu- ¶un-dan-pa midawis mir~…ĺabu tu ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo ¶uŇč-tun ¶i j…ôn-s…ô-kaj, r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn ku nipisit…ôk…ôd, misumad tu udip tu sapikuwan tu udip a kanatar~…ĺ. ¶ajsiw ¶ajsiw mińß ¶aan, ¶i si-su- ¶…ôn r~…ĺadaj…ôn nida ku ńßitaj mid…ôbuŇč tu ku Ē~ °-r~…ĺun, r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn nida ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a mun-ku nipikuwan tu udip. **** .
S.FORM: == kakaliman == U-lan-pa-tuo ÁÉŹŤė≠Ś∑īśČė U-lan-pa-tuo-se " Mun-ku kamu Š†§Š†ĮŠ††Š†≠Š††Š†®Š†™Š††Š†≠Š††Š†≤Š†§Š†∑, Si-li-e sulit : –£–Ľ–į–į–Ĺ–Ī–į–į—ā–į—Ä, nalngal nu Mun-ku: ( äňĆ…ģaňźm‚ÄŅ'paňź įt…ôŐÜr) , u suo-tu nu Mun-ku kanatal. U-lan-pa-tuo itida i Mun-ku talakaway a buyu' nu teban a niyaduan, kitidaan makaala tu 4704 pin-hun-kun-li, tademaw hakiya makaala tu 144 a wangan nu tademaw, mikipangkiw tu Mun-ku a tademaw , u satabakiay nu Mun-ku a tukay, cen-ce, tatelungan nu kakadidengan. mililis tu Tu-la-sa'wac, satanayu' sa, nutipan idaw ku U-lan-pa-tuo Cen-ci-se-han a pahikukian, maci nu timulan idaw ku Mun-ku Sen-sa-puo-ke-ta-han buyu', tungduh nu buyu' idaw ku Cey-sang kakininaga a paya, sipakay pabaw miadih maadih ku macimacian. tatelungan nu maci idaw ku kanatal kun atu Su-he-pa-tuo putah. mitulin tu Cung-E' a Mun-ku mitesul tu dadan nu silamalay taydan i U-lan-pa-tuo, amis katukuh tu Se'-le'ke sen Su-he'-pa-tuo, tumul katukuh tu Cung-kuo Nae-mun-ku nu udip a kitidaan E-lin-haw-te'-se. 145 : ( äňĆ…ģaňźm‚ÄŅ'paňź įt…ôŐÜr) , . likisi ś≠∑ŚŹ≤ i laylayan nu Mun-ku a cudad nu U-lan-pa-tuo nu tawyaay a ngangan nu lalaan. makawali katukuh tu kawanan u U-e-ka, Ta-ku'-lun, Cin-cen-ku'-lun, U-lan-pa-tuo. 23 U-lan-pa-tuo nitahawan patideng i cin-caw-cung-de sapatay a mihcaan " caynemlusiw mihcaan" naw Mun-ku-ke-e-ke-pu a samiyan ci Se'-pu'-cun-dan-pa-hu-tu-ke'-tu itida patideng, saan u Ku-lun "—Ö“Į—Ä—ć—ć/Š†¨Š†¶Š†∑Š†ĘŠ†∂Š†éŠ†°", langatan ku liwliw nu lutuk. itida i Tu-sya-tu-ha niyadu'an nu Cung-ci lalabu. Cin-lun nu zitayan , Ku-lun u Ku-lun kakitidaan nu tapang. Cin-lun sepat a bataan idaw ku tulu a mihcaan " caypicpicwal mihcaan" , cin-caw patideng tu sapilawa' a cabeng, atu Mun-ku nu dumaan a kitidaan sipangangan tu "Ku-lun" a kakitidaan a kakenihan, ina maci u Ta-ku-lin "–ė—Ö –•“Į—Ä—ć—ć", hekalay a kanatal pangangan han tina kitidaan u U-e-ka "”®—Ä–≥”©”©, igu :Urga, imi u "luma nu tahudan" 100 "caysiwcaycay" Sin-hay-ke-min, pase ci Ce-pu-cun-dan-pa itida i E'-luo-se-ti'-kuo a nipacukedan mihapu i hekal nu Mun-ku a misiteked, u Ta-han, patideng tu Ta-mun-ku kanatal, u Ta-ku'-lun ku suo-tu. sa Ta-ku-lun misumad tu ngangan u Cin-cen-ku'-lun " –Ě–ł–Ļ—Ā–Ľ—ć–Ľ –•“Į—Ä—ć—ć". caysiwcaylim mihcaan, Ce-pu-cun-dan-pa midawis milabu tu Cung-hua-min-kuo cung-tun ci Yen-se-kay, lawpesen ku nipisiteked, misumad tu udip tu sapikuwan tu udip a kanatal. caysiwcaysiw mihcaan, ci Si-su-cen ladayen nida ku hitay midebung tu Ku'-lun, lawpesen nida ku hekalay a Mun-ku nipikuwan tu udip. 1911 .

mun-ku kanatar~…ĺ. u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo itida i mun-ku tar~…ĺakawaj a buju Ē~ ° nu t…ôban a nijaduan, kitidaan makaar~…ĺa tu **** pin-ńßun-kun-r~…ĺi, tad…ômaw ńßakija makaar~…ĺa tu *** a waŇčan nu u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo ¶…ôn- ¶i-s…ô-ńßan a pańßikukian, ma ¶i nu timur~…ĺan idaw ku mun-ku s…ôn-sa-puo-k…ô-ta-ńßan buju Ē~ °, tuŇčduńß nu buju Ē~ ° idaw ku ¶…ô-saŇč kakininaga a paja, sipakaj pabaw miadińß maadińß ku ma ¶ima ¶ian. tat…ôr~…ĺuŇčan nu ma ¶i idaw ku kanatar~…ĺ kun atu su-ńß…ô-pa-tuo putańß. mitur~…ĺin tu ¶uŇč-…ô Ē~ ° a mun-ku mit…ôsur~…ĺ tu dadan nu sir~…ĺamar~…ĺaj tajdan i u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo, amis katukuńß tu s…ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺ…ô Ē~ °k…ô s…ôn su-ńß…ô Ē~ °-pa-tuo, tumur~…ĺ katukuńß tu ¶uŇč-kuo na…ô-mun-ku nu udip a kitidaan …ô-r~…ĺin-ńßaw-t…ô Ē~ °-s…ô. *** : (***a*m* Ē~ °pa**t…ô*r) , . r~…ĺikisi ** i r~…ĺajr~…ĺajan nu mun-ku a ¶udad nu u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo nu tawjaaj a ŇčaŇčan nu r~…ĺar~…ĺaan. makawar~…ĺi katukuńß tu kawanan u u-…ô-ka, ta-ku Ē~ °-r~…ĺun, ¶in- ¶…ôn-ku Ē~ °-r~…ĺun, u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo. ** u-r~…ĺan-pa-tuo nitańßawan patid…ôŇč i ¶in- ¶aw- ¶uŇč-d…ô sapataj a mińß ¶aan " ¶ajn…ômr~…ĺusiw mińß ¶aan" naw mun-ku-k…ô-…ô-k…ô-pu a samijan ¶i s…ô Ē~ °-pu Ē~ °- ¶un-dan-pa-ńßu-tu-k…ô Ē~ °-tu itida patid…ôŇč, saan u ku-r~…ĺun "*****/*******", r~…ĺaŇčatan ku r~…ĺiwr~…ĺiw nu r~…ĺutuk. itida i tu-sja-tu-ńßa nijadu Ē~ °an nu ¶uŇč- ¶i r~…ĺar~…ĺabu. ¶in-r~…ĺun nu zitajan , ku-r~…ĺun u ku-r~…ĺun kakitidaan nu tapaŇč. ¶in-r~…ĺun s…ôpat a bataan idaw ku tur~…ĺu a mińß ¶aan " ¶ajpi ¶pi ¶war~…ĺ mińß ¶aan" , ¶in- ¶aw patid…ôŇč tu sapir~…ĺawa Ē~ ° a ¶ab…ôŇč, atu mun-ku nu dumaan a kitidaan sipaŇčaŇčan tu "ku-r~…ĺun" a kakitidaan a kak…ônińßan, ina ma ¶i u ta-ku-r~…ĺin "** *****", ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a kanatar~…ĺ paŇčaŇčan ńßan tina kitidaan u u-…ô-ka "*****, igu :urga, imi u "r~…ĺuma nu tańßudan" *** " ¶ajsiw ¶aj ¶aj" sin-ńßaj-k…ô-min, pas…ô ¶i ¶…ô-pu- ¶un-dan-pa itida i …ô Ē~ °-r~…ĺuo-s…ô-ti Ē~ °-kuo a nipa ¶uk…ôdan mińßapu i ńß…ôkar~…ĺ nu mun-ku a misit…ôk…ôd, u ta-ńßan, patid…ôŇč tu ta-mun-ku kanatar~…ĺ, u ta-ku Ē~ °-r~…ĺun ku suo-tu. sa ta-ku-r~…ĺun misumad tu ŇčaŇčan u ¶in- ¶…ôn-ku Ē~ °-r~…ĺun " ******* *****". ¶ajsiw ¶ajr~…ĺim mińß ¶aan, ¶…ô-pu- ¶un-dan-pa midawis mir~…ĺabu tu ¶uŇč-ńßua-min-kuo ¶uŇč-tun ¶i j…ôn-s…ô-kaj, r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn ku nipisit…ôk…ôd, misumad tu udip tu sapikuwan tu udip a kanatar~…ĺ. ¶ajsiw ¶ajsiw mińß ¶aan, ¶i si-su- ¶…ôn r~…ĺadaj…ôn nida ku ńßitaj mid…ôbuŇč tu ku Ē~ °-r~…ĺun, r~…ĺawp…ôs…ôn nida ku ńß…ôkar~…ĺaj a mun-ku nipikuwan tu udip. **** .
